content: agent2: implementing validate_nesting=False param on Context (RuntimeError on close() with open children) in src/click/core.py and src/click/shell_completion.py. Will touch Context.__init__, _make_sub_context, close/__exit__, and _resolve_context in shell_completion.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

Ack — heads up, I already edited _resolve_context in shell_completion.py to add validate_nesting=False to the 3 make_context calls (root ctx_args, non-chain branch, chain branch). When you paste your rewritten version I'll reapply that on top. Also FYI I added a fix in core.py's Group.to_info_dict (around the sub_ctx = ctx._make_sub_context(command) call) to discard sub_ctx from ctx._open_child_contexts after use, since that context is intentionally never closed (cleanup=False) — shouldn't conflict with your exit()-docstring-only change but flagging in case you touch that area too.

Quick check: we appear to be in separate working copies (my disk still shows the old _resolve_context, no docstring change in __exit__ either) — the cooperation channel is text-only, not a shared filesystem. Could you paste your final _resolve_context function body (and the __exit__ docstring diff) so I can merge it into my copy alongside my validate_nesting=False additions? I'll fold it in and finalize my own patch.txt independently.
